title: feat(sign): GPU-pod-rent consent gate — !sidecar sign rent (human-only one-shot token)
body: New sidecar sign command + GPU-pod-rent consent gate: renting a pod (hexa cloud rent/up) is a real-money action, so pre bash now BLOCKS it (CLOUD-RENT-UNSIGNED) until the HUMAN mints a one-shot consent token via the TUI bang '!sidecar sign rent' — ported from the retired hexa _sign_guard.hexa (old '! sidecar sign commons' pattern). modules/sign.ts: host-global plain-epoch token store ~/.sidecar/signs/<key>.sign, TTL rent=600s, one-shot (consumed atomically on admission via rename-then-unlink; pre-consume stops parallel double-spend); CLI verbs list/mint/check/clear; helpers signFresh/consumeSign/detectSelfMint/signForgeBashTarget/isSignsPath. cloud-guard.ts: detectCloudRent (direct head-match gated; indirect bash-c/eval/ssh/pool wrapper blocked); fixed pre-existing segment-local weakness — isHexaBuiltin exempted the WHOLE command string so 'hexa cloud pods; raw-create' leaked; now sanctioned per-SEGMENT. pre.ts: SIGN-SELF-MINT + SIGN-FORGE(bash) in preBash, rent gate LAST (never burns the one-shot token), SIGN-FORGE(write) in preWrite. TTL/one-shot are CODE constants (no config opt-out). No new hook wiring: both surfaces already route bash and write. Docs: commands/sign.md, templates/sign.md. Skipped as over-eng (sol): repo-scope hash, JSON/nonce token, MCP pre-tool deny — phase-2. Smoke: unsigned/self-mint/forge block; mint->rent allow+consume->re-block; echo/grep allow; indirect block; seg-local block; tsc+lint+ci green.

title: commons: add no-bare-jargon slug
body: User-facing prose must gloss every jargon/acronym/hyphenated/backtick term at first use (plain-word swap or term(=plain meaning)); elevates the easy-style advisory into an always-on governance hard rule. Also trimmed the lab ARCHITECTURE node under the 300-char cell cap.

title: fix(lab): guard child.stdin null (TS18047) — origin/main tsc RED 복구
body: child.stdin 은 spawn 타입상 Writable|null 인데 널가드 없이 .write/.end 호출 → strict tsc TS18047(2곳: fable·sol 백엔드). origin/main 이 이 상태로 머지돼 sidecar 전체 ci(npx tsc --noEmit)가 RED. optional chaining(child.stdin?.write/?.end)으로 가드 — stdin 이 null 이면 spawn 실패라 error 핸들러가 이미 settle(127) 처리하므로 안전. tsc exit 0 복구.

title: feat(easy): 0순위 맨-은어 금지 + 경중 2단(인라인풀이/7요소) + bare-jargon-gloss lint 축
body: LEAN(매턴 주입) 재설계: "7요소를 사소하지 않은 개념마다"는 진행보고·요약처럼 은어 섞인 서술에는 안 걸려 통째로 스킵됐다(실패사례 H_9774 CEMENTING류 은어 범벅). 이제 0순위=맨-은어 금지(no bare jargon): 프로젝트 은어·약어·전문용어가 산문에 처음 나오면 그 자리에서 `용어(=쉬운 뜻)`로 풀이. 경중 2단 도입 — Tier1 인라인 풀이(기본·필수·대부분의 산문) vs Tier2 풀 7요소(새 개념·도구 자체가 답의 주인공일 때만). 기존 "제외" 목록은 표기-제외로 재정의(풀이 의무는 남음)해 회피 구실 봉쇄. modules/easy.ts header() lean 리드+활성 배너도 7요소 최상위→0순위 풀이 우선으로 lockstep 수정(LEAN과 지시충돌 제거). FULL 레퍼런스에 before→after 리라이트 gold(실패사례 박제)+인라인풀이 미니 gold+체크리스트 1번=bare-jargon 스캔 추가. easy lint 6번째 축 bare-jargon-gloss 추가(하이픈결합·백틱 은어 후보 → 첫 등장 근처 풀이 없으면 경고 · =다음 한글=풀이/=다음 은어=수식 구분 · 쉬운말(용어) 앞쪽형+term(=뜻) 뒤쪽형 양방향 · common allowlist 오탐억제 · advisory exit0). ko(주입대상)+en(canonical base) 동기화. lean byte ko 957→1519·en→1454. tsc 0 · lint BAD 4/4 flag·GOOD 3형태 통과 검증.

title: fix(lab): foreground 출력을 durable 타임스탬프 파일에 tee — 파이프/tail/백그라운드 stdout 절단 시에도 답변 무손실
body: runForeground/runFull은 stdout을 상속(inherit)만 하고 durable 사본을 남기지 않아, harness가 120s에 백그라운드로 옮기거나 stdout이 tail/파이프로 잘리면 fable/sol 실제 답변이 유실됐다(캡처파일엔 앞선 echo만). fix: openLabLog() 도입 — 모든 foreground lab 실행(fable/sol/full)이 전체 출력을 ~/.sidecar/lab/<ts>-<backend>.md 에 tee 하고 그 경로를 stderr에 안내. stdout 동작(라이브 스트림·── fable ──/── sol ── 섹션·--json 머신클린)은 불변 — 파일은 순수 안전망. runForeground는 stdout을 inherit→pipe 로 바꿔 실stdout+로그로 티, sol --json 은 clean 캡처를 로그로 티. runFull은 결합 섹션을 stdout+로그 동시기록. 로그 열기 실패는 warn 후 no-op(실행 절대 안 깨짐)·--dry 는 파일 미생성. help-lockstep: USAGE 에 durable-file 1줄. 검증: fable 'PONG'|tail-1 → stdout 잘려도 파일에 PONG 영속·full → fable+sol 두 섹션 모두 파일 영속·dry → 파일 0.

title: feat(commons): add sudo-authorized rule — owner grants sudo on this host + all pool hosts; run privileged ops the task needs without punting (owner-trust·anti-punt); commonsCap 10000→10300 for the new kernel
lab + lab-mode: full (both models) is now the default backend/target
body: Both the per-call hub and the session toggle now default to full (BOTH models in parallel), per user request. lab: the backend positional becomes OPTIONAL — a first word that is not fable/sol/full is the START OF THE PROMPT and the whole argv goes to full (DEFAULT_BACKEND), so 'sidecar lab "설계안 검토"' asks both models. Naming a backend still narrows to it; job verbs (result/tail/wait/list) are matched before this and unaffected. The old 'unknown subcommand' error path is gone, so a near-miss TYPO of a backend name would otherwise silently prepend a stray word AND fan out to both models — guarded by backendTypo(): same length AND same first letter AND one edit (substitution or ADJACENT TRANSPOSITION, since plain Levenshtein scores the common 'fable'->'fabel' typo as 2). Deliberately narrow so legitimate prompts opening with 'null'/'table'/'sole' still flow through; the rejection message names the real escapes (name the backend, or --file/stdin) because quoting does not help. Known limits (accepted): insertion/deletion typos ('fulll') fall through to prompt text, and a prompt whose first argv word is 'fill'/'fall' is rejected. lab-mode: DEFAULT_TARGET fable -> full, so bare 'lab-mode on' delegates to both and the agent reconciles; legacy fable-mode flag-file migration pinned to a separate LEGACY_TARGET='fable' so it preserves what the old file meant instead of following the new default. help-lockstep: cli/index.ts both help blocks, USAGE, module headers, commands/lab.md (desc under the 320 cap), templates/lab.md, README, ARCHITECTURE lab + lab-mode nodes. QA 13/13 PASS.

title: fix(pre): enforcement.json rule data honours {scratchDir} — stop hardcoding the scratch path into guards
body: PR #421 fixed the {scratchDir} contradiction in commons.md but missed the SAME bug class in the enforcement rule data. config/enforcement.json hardcoded the literal scripts/scratch in 5 places (H-TMP-SCRATCH desc/exceptions/reason, the DOC-scatter reason, a prompt hint) while modules/pre.ts loadConfig() did a plain readJson with no substitution — even though the built-in TMP-VOLATILE sibling in the same file (pre.ts:377,524) is config-driven via config().docs.scratchDir. Consequences, all measured: (1) sidecar itself plus bio/phanes/ytdl were SPLIT-BRAIN — docs.scratchDir unset means the code default state drives TMP-VOLATILE and the commons preserve-state rule, while their H-TMP-SCRATCH still aimed at scripts/scratch; (2) traffic and anima-v4 carry no .harness/enforcement.json and so ran the fossil straight from the bundle via the resolveRuleFile fallback; (3) sidecar init copies the bundle into every new repo (init.ts:183-196), reseeding the fossil forever; (4) worst, hand-migrating the literal is how guards get silently mis-aimed — pool shipped exactly that: its exception is the bare regex "state", which case-insensitively substring-matches useState/statement/restate, so those commands were EXEMPT from the /tmp guard. Fix follows the commons.ts:body() precedent: loadConfig() now substitutes {scratchDir} through the parsed rule tree, verbatim in prose fields (desc/reason/hint) and REGEX-ESCAPED in pattern fields (match/path_match/content_forbidden_pattern/exceptions/bypass_patterns/match_patterns, escaping modelled on tmp-guard.ts:25) so a scratchDir with metacharacters cannot corrupt a pattern. The bundle now carries {scratchDir}, and the exceptions entry is {scratchDir}/ WITH the trailing slash — that slash is what makes pools bare-substring hole structurally impossible. Verified by driving the real pre-bash hook: a repo with scratchDir unset gets the guard aimed at state/, one with scripts/scratch gets scripts/scratch/ from the SAME bundle rule; cp /tmp/x state/keep.txt is exempt (0 fires) while echo "useState(1)" > /tmp/s.js still warns (1 fire); traffic and anima-v4 now resolve to state/ with zero repo edits; cardbypass (literal override, no placeholder) is unchanged = no regression; tsc clean. NOT done here: the 19 repos keeping scratchDir=scripts/scratch stay internally consistent and need no edit; hexa-lang must KEEP scripts/scratch (live self-referential gate scripts, compiler source and ARCHITECTURE.json point at it) — its config is a legitimate choice, not a fossil; pools live bare-"state" exception is a separate repo fix.

title: lab-mode: rename fable-mode → lab-mode with fable·sol·full targets (mirrors lab)
body: Rename fable-mode → lab-mode and generalize it the same way lab itself was (fable/sol/full). The toggle's TARGET is now a positional arg to on (sidecar lab-mode on [fable|sol|full], default fable) persisted as the flag file's CONTENT — one file per scope (.harness/lab-mode, ~/.sidecar/lab-mode), so a scope can never hold a contradictory multi-target state. ON if either exists; both set with different targets → repo target wins (specific beats ambient). The per-turn UserPromptSubmit directive is parameterized by target: fable/sol name their model + the right absorb path (fable --json → .result, sol --json → clean stdout); full delegates ONE 'lab full' call and adds a RECONCILE rule (agree → adopt, disagree → verify against repo/tests, unverifiable → take fable and record sol's dissent in one line, never silently average). No fable-mode alias (canonical-naming) — the only machine callers were the hook wirings rewritten in the same commit; legacy .harness/fable-mode + ~/.sidecar/fable-mode flag files auto-migrate at read time to lab-mode with content 'fable' (best-effort, inject path never fails), so an already-ON host stays ON with zero user action. Wired on BOTH surfaces (hooks/hooks.json + setup.ts Stop/UserPromptSubmit list + pi/sidecar.ts) per wire-to-prod; help-lockstep in cli/index.ts; README + templates/lab.md + ARCHITECTURE module node renamed in place.

title: fix(commons): repo override layers per slug instead of replacing the whole SSOT (anima got 1 of 32 rules)
body: A repo override (.harness/commons.md) silently replaced the ENTIRE cross-project governance SSOT instead of layering per slug, so anima — whose override carries 1 rule — was injected 1 of 32 rules every turn, missing git-safety, honesty, verify-done, root-cause, anti-punt and 26 others, including pi5-akida-anima, the rule about anima itself. The intent was documented on both sides and ignored by the code: commons.md line 3 says "Repo override -> .harness/commons.md. Keyed by stable slug", and anima override header says verbatim "Only the slugs listed here override commons; every other commons rule still applies". modules/commons.ts:34 resolved to ONE file (resolveRuleFile returns the override when present, else the bundled), so everything not restated in the override vanished. body() now parses both docs into slug-keyed sections and layers them: base = bundled config/commons.md, each override slug replaces its base section in place, a slug absent from base is appended, and an unreadable override falls back to the shared SSOT (partial governance beats none). This is the SAME merge convention errors.ts already uses for severity-map.json ("repo wins per rule code" — its comment describes this identical failure class), so commons was the lone outlier. resolveRuleFile is untouched: whole-file resolution stays correct for severity maps, keyword lists and recommend.md. Verified by output: anima 1 -> 32 rules with its preserve-state override still winning and pi5-akida-anima now present; void/hexa-lang/merchant (no override) byte-identical, zero regression; a synthetic repo proves override-wins-in-place, repo-only-slug append (33), and unreadable-override fallback (32, not silence); {scratchDir} substitution survives the merge; tsc clean.

title: fix(commons/preserve-state): stop injecting a self-contradicting scratchDir rule into 19 repos
body: A 32-rule adversarial audit of commons.md (57 agents) found one real defect: preserve-state injected a self-contradiction into 19 of 29 repos on every turn. modules/commons.ts:36 substitutes {scratchDir} into the do-line only; the dont-line hardcoded `scripts/scratch`, which is exactly the scratchDir those 19 repos carry (inherited from harness.config.example.json:72, a fossil left behind when #52 unified work artifacts under state/ and moved the lib/config.ts:374 default to "state"). Those repos were told do: put outputs in scripts/scratch/ AND dont: no new dirs like scripts/scratch, simultaneously. This defeated the stated purpose of the substitution mechanism, whose own comment (commons.ts:30-32) says a repo that relocates the scratch root must "not be handed a governance rule that contradicts its own config every turn". Fix makes the dont-line substitution-safe by construction: it now forbids "a second outputs dir outside {scratchDir}/" rather than enumerating a literal that can BE the sanctioned dir. Kept `.verdicts` and `bench` as recognition triggers — verified both still exist on disk (airgenome/forge/gamebox/.verdicts, hexa-codex/hexa-lang/bench) and neither is any repo scratchDir, so they cannot collide; a skeptic pass proved dropping them would be lossy. Verified across all 29 repo configs: contradictions 0. Left ARCHITECTURE.md in the example untouched — checked and it is a legitimate choice (15 repos use it), not drift. NOT fixed: the 19 repos still carry scratchDir=scripts/scratch, so their outputs sit outside the state/ convention #52 intended — migrating them moves real files across 19 repos and is the owners call, not mechanical. The audit also refuted 12 of 13 proposed compressions (e.g. dropping `· afg` from fanout-workflow would ban a shipped skill; git-safety commons.md:35 is the only --force-with-lease prohibition in the repo) and confirmed 0 drift, so no compression is bundled here.

title: commons(hexa-lang-model): sync rule to lang-model.md §4 consumer duties
body: Synced the rule to its SSOT (merged as hexa-lang #4993, docs/lang-model.md). Gap-analysed the rule against the doc: no drift, but the doc's §4 (소비 레포 적용 지침) places two duties on consumer repos that the rule left unencoded — write .hexa so static types stay determinable (so unboxing levers apply), and the arena-escape remedy (return it / build at module scope, not the prohibition alone). Both are now in the rule. In the same pass compressed the rule from ~1225 to 391 chars: it was the single fattest slug (~10% of commons.md) and both do/dont lines sat far over the 200-char dodontCap (grandfathered); editing it re-triggered DODONT-LONG + the 10000B COMMONS-OVERSIZED file cap (origin/main was already 10556B — the caps only fire on a staged commons.md, so any touch forces the file back under). Dropped hexa-lang-internal detail a consumer can't act on (leak-lane/lint env-var names, measure-first census+byteeq/nvptx gate lives in the SSOT doc) rather than padding. File 10556 -> 9882B, both lines under cap, lint green on staged.

title: commons: hexa-lang-model 룰 추가 — hexa 정적타입/메모리관리 모델 채택+반영 강제
body: hexa 소비 레포(.hexa)는 hexa 언어모델(기본=arena 자동관리·@own=opt-in·farr_* 수동free+leak-lane·정적타입 언박싱 measure-first)을 따르고 어긋난 코드 수정, hexa-lang은 L4/L5 model을 docs/lang-model.md+ARCHITECTURE에 lockstep 유지. SSOT=hexa-lang/docs/lang-model.md(#4993).

title: pool on --bg: detached remote run that survives ssh drop
body: Detached remote run (setsid, new session) that survives an ssh drop — long train/sweep/eval jobs no longer die with exit 255 when the orphan fence group-kills them on disconnect. Launch returns at once with a remote log path to poll. Default fenced foreground behavior unchanged (--bg additive). Verified on summer: launch ~2s, detached job completes after the launch session ended. help-lockstep: module header + commands/pool.md.

title: toolkit: kill emit-time inject truncation — line-1/detail split + author-time <=200B gate
body: makeInject/list byte-sliced use to 140 and triggers to 6 — an emit-time truncation that VIOLATED CLAUDE.md inject-lint and silently dropped content from 28/79 commands (e.g. 'lab full=BOTH parallel'). Split ToolkitEntry into use (line-1 summary, emitted VERBATIM) + detail (continuation lines, JSONL/help only). Remove all .slice cuts in renderInject and list. Add toolkitUseViolations() author-time gate (line 1 <=USE_CAP_BYTES 200B, standalone, present) wired into 'toolkit check' + commit lint (INJECT-OVERSIZED). Rewrap 13 HELP entries; add descriptions for errors/ledger. Register the ban in CLAUDE.md inject-lint. No emit-time truncation anywhere in toolkit.ts; JSONL keeps full fidelity.

title: lab help: front-load full=BOTH so catalog inject stops truncating it
body: lab: front-load fable·sol·full=BOTH into the help first line so the 140-char toolkit catalog inject no longer truncates before full=both (agent could not see that lab full runs both models in parallel from the SessionStart catalog)

title: refactor(lab): fable 폐기 → lab 위임 허브(fable·sol·full · Codex 5.6 gpt-5.6-sol 추가)
body: fable 단일 명령을 폐기하고 lab(구 스캐폴더도 폐기)을 프론티어 모델 위임 허브로 재탄생. `sidecar lab <fable|sol|full>`: fable=Claude Fable 5(claude -p·claude-fable-5·opus fallback 무조건 금지), sol=OpenAI Codex 5.6(codex exec·gpt-5.6-sol), full=둘 병렬(── fable ──/── sol ── 라벨 섹션·exit=fable≠0?fable:sol). 백엔드는 데이터(Backend descriptor: bin·defaultModel·naFlags·buildArgv) — 공용 1벌의 프롬프트 리졸버(argv/--file/stdin→자식 stdin·배타)·bg 잡 시스템(--bg→<backend>-<ts> 잡ID·result/tail/wait/list·~/.sidecar/lab-jobs)·--dry/--cwd/--timeout(기본무제한·124)를 공유. 티어: 기본 investigate(fable: Write/Edit/NotebookEdit 거부·bash/read 허용 / sol: -s read-only)·--write=구현(fable: bypassPermissions / sol: -s workspace-write). --json 클린답(fable: claude json blob / sol: codex -o 최종메시지만·JSONL 파싱 안 함). 연속: -c/-r(sol=codex exec resume --last|<id>; resume 경로엔 -s 없어 -c sandbox_mode 오버라이드로 대체 — codex-cli 0.144.1 검증). full은 -c/-r/-- 거부·--sources는 fable leg 만. 배선 갱신: cli/index.ts(runFable import+case+HELP 제거·lab HELP 신규)·fable-mode inject 3곳 및 노드(sidecar fable→sidecar lab fable)·config/keywords.json(fable-delegate→lab-delegate·sol/codex 트리거 추가)·commands/{fable.md 삭제·lab.md 재작성}·templates/{fable.md·lab/ 디렉터리 삭제·lab.md 런북 신규)·ARCHITECTURE(구 lab 스캐폴더 노드 삭제·fable 노드→lab 허브+fable/sol/full 자식·convergence fable-md-1/fable-ts-1/-2 source→lab.ts|lab.md)·README·toolkit 카탈로그 재생성. 라이브 스모크: lab sol→PONG, lab sol --json→클린 캡처 확인. 곁다리: origin/main #412 가 들여온 naming-guard detail 셀 543자 ARCH-BIG-CELL 위반이 lint 게이트를 막아 자식 노드로 분해(면제 2단).

title: lint.archIdPattern — ARCH-ID-FORMAT 정규식 config 화
body:
ARCH-ID-FORMAT 의 id 정규식이 하드코딩이라, 부모를 id 에 담는 의도적 관례(mech-3.falsifier · L4.arms)를 쓰는 저장소는 트리 의미를 뭉개는 것 외에 선택지가 없었다 — L1.one-bit-seam → l1-one-bit-seam 은 L1 이 Law 1 이라는 정보를 잃는다. 형제 규칙 archCellCap 은 처음부터 config-driven 이었고 이쪽만 누락이었다.

lint.archIdPattern 신설 (기본 ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$ = 기존 동작 그대로 → 다른 저장소 영향 0). 의도적 관례를 쓰는 저장소는 harness.config.json 에 선언한다.

부수 확인: 이 규칙의 명분('search 가 주소로 쓰도록 grep-clean 유지')은 kebab 을 정당화하지 못한다 — search 는 id 를 부분문자열로 매칭하므로 점 표기도 그대로 검색된다(#413 에서 search 가 name 없는 트리를 아예 못 보던 버그를 고친 뒤 확인).

title: architecture search: name 없는 {id, role} 트리 매칭
body:
walk 이 nodeName 유무로 게이트해서, c4 스켈레톤이 내보내는 name-less {id, role} 노드는 전부 스킵됐다 — 방문은 하되 한 건도 검사 안 함. anima-v4 에서 재현: 'salvage'/'overview'/'mech' 가 id 로 트리에 있는데 0 hit.

lint 쪽 ARCH-ID-MISSING 은 이미 name 의존을 벗어나도록 넓혀졌는데(rendered node = name/role/detail 중 아무거나) search 만 안 따라와서, 두 절반이 'rendered node' 정의를 다르게 봤다. 그 결과 ARCH-ID-FORMAT 이 '검색 가능한 키를 유지하라'며 kebab id 를 강제하는 동안 정작 search 는 그 키를 쳐다보지 않았다 — 명분이 공허했다.

수정: 양쪽에 같은 rendered-node 판정(name/role/detail 중 아무거나) 적용 · breadcrumb 과 결과 헤더는 name 없으면 id 로 폴백해 ' — role' 대신 읽히는 경로가 나오게 함.

후속 메모: 점 표기 id(mech-3.codec-war)도 부분문자열 검색은 정상이므로, ARCH-ID-FORMAT 의 searchability 근거는 kebab-case 를 정당화하지 못한다.

title: feat(naming-guard): .canonical-ok 디렉터리 마커 = 서브트리 면제
body: naming-guard 면제를 파일 단위(@canonical-ok in content)에서 **디렉터리 단위**(.canonical-ok 마커 파일)로 확장했다. 동기: dancinlab/anima 오너가 anima-v2/ 를 '규칙 적용 안 함 · 실험이니까'로 선언했는데, 기존 가드는 그 구역의 모든 파일마다 마커 문자열을 요구했다 — 면제가 아니라 세금. 구역을 구역에서 한 번 선언하는 게 '이 폴더는 면제'의 본래 의미다. Write/Edit + Bash 양쪽 적용(한쪽만 하면 mkdir 이 막혀 반쪽 면제). .git 에서 탐색 중단해 레포 경계 밖 마커가 남의 레포를 면제시키지 않게 했다. 검증 6/6: 마커 없으면 BLOCK 유지(가드 생존 증명) · 있으면 면제 · 마커 없는 형제 폴더와 report_final.md 는 그대로 BLOCK(면제 누수 없음).

title: pod·model·dataset 관리 명령 3종 폐기 (GPU 디스패치는 hexa cloud 로 일원화)
body: pod·model·dataset 관리 기능 3종을 통째로 폐기. 삭제: modules/{pod-poll,models,dataset}.ts · commands/{pod,models,dataset}.md · templates/pod.md · cli/index.ts 등록(import+case+HELP) · runbooks.ts runPod/POD_SUBCMDS · ing.ts 팟 표면표시(loadPods) · ARCHITECTURE 3개 모듈 노드 · README 3개 행. 직전 커밋(#410)의 pods.jsonl SSOT 통합도 함께 되돌림(pod 자체가 사라짐). 잔여 사용자 지시(pre.ts 블록 메시지·keywords 힌트·dojo/micro-exp 템플릿의 sidecar pod → hexa cloud) 갱신. GPU 클라우드 디스패치는 hexa cloud 로 일원화(commons canonical-cli). 모델/데이터셋 등록 데이터는 애초 0건이라 고아 데이터 없음.

title: pod: ING+pod-watch.json 이원화 → 단일 공용 ~/.sidecar/pods.jsonl SSOT 통합
body: 팟(GPU pod) 관리를 ING(kind:"pod" on ing ref) + pod-watch.json 이원화에서 단일 공용 SSOT ~/.sidecar/pods.jsonl 로 통합. 로스터(provider/gpu/purpose/cost · 옛 ing pod)와 watch/poll 설정이 같은 엔트리에 산다(append형 jsonl · pool.json 위치 + ING.jsonl 포맷 동형). sidecar pod {add|rm|list|watch|unwatch|poll}: add/rm=로스터, watch=cadence 표시(엔트리 없으면 생성), unwatch=폴링만 중단(로스터 유지), 성공 teardown=자동 제거. ing 은 팟 store 소유를 놓고 loadPods() 로 실행중 팟만 inject/show 에 표면 표시. 옛 pod-watch.json 키드 레지스트리 1회 마이그레이션.

title: fix(turn-close): signal-scan Stop gates → ONE mandatory 🔄/🏛️/🧬 trio gate (turn-close check)
body:
The four signal-driven Stop gates (`ing stop-check`, `architecture stop-check`, `architecture convergence stop-check`, `architecture gate-stop-check`) are replaced by ONE deterministic gate: `turn-close check`. Every reply must now carry the trio — 🔄 ING · 🏛️ ARCHITECTURE · 🧬 CONVERGENCE — together, each either a 갱신/기록 claim or an explicit no-change affirmation.

WHY: a keyword net over the agent own last message fired unpredictably and LATE, ambushing the turn AFTER the reply was written, so the three reports never landed together. Worse, they could not all be enforced: each gate was bounded by stop_hook_active (anti-wedge), so the FIRST gate to block consumed the chain and the other two silently skipped — two thirds of the trio was structurally unenforceable. `ing stop-check` was additionally DEAD: wired only in hooks/hooks.json (plugin cache), absent from modules/setup.ts Stop[], hence absent from the live ~/.claude/settings.json (setup-ts-1).

NEW: one gate, one block, one reason listing every missing/forged leg → repaired in a single re-turn. Claims are diff-verified (marker-only self-report forgery is blocked · verify-done): ING = `ing` ref advanced · ARCHITECTURE = file in the git footprint (working·staged·last commit) · CONVERGENCE = records[] id + the same footprint. No-change affirmations are never verified (false-positive-averse). Inert when no leg is active (no design tree AND no board) — a plain repo is never gated.

DELETED: findSignal / nudgedSignals / markNudged / loadTriggers / loadResultSignals / loadGateSignals, the 🔬 GATE marker, config.convergenceEnforce, and config/{convergence-triggers,gate-signals,result-signals}.json. A gate verdict IS an ARCHITECTURE.json type:"gate" node edit, so the mandatory 🏛️ line already reports and forgery-verifies it (single-doc). Old verbs survive one release as SILENT no-op tombstones so a stale settings.json does not error every turn.

WIRING (both surfaces): hooks/hooks.json + modules/setup.ts Stop[] (turn-close check) and UserPromptSubmit (turn-close inject) + pi/sidecar.ts PER_TURN.

title: fix architecture read root-node-shaped ARCHITECTURE.json, not only the {tree} wrapper
body: architecture skeleton/search assumed a wrapper-shaped doc ({title,summary,tree}) and read .tree directly. Roughly a third of the repos' ARCHITECTURE.json IS the root node ({name,children}) — for those the SessionStart skeleton silently rendered an EMPTY table of contents and `architecture search` crashed on nodeName(undefined). Both readers now go through one rootNode() that accepts either shape. Also registered `value` as a detail alias: those same trees carry their body text in `value`, so search matched nothing in them even without the crash (lint saw those cells only because it walks every string leaf regardless of key).

title: pool on: orphan fence — reap the remote process group when the local ssh dies
body:
A PTY-less sshd closes the pipes but never SIGHUPs the session, so a `pool on` whose local ssh is killed (--timeout SIGKILL, ctrl-C, dropped link) left its remote descendants reparented to init (PPID=1), still holding their RSS. A 15GB hexa orphan wedged summer into a cgroup-throttle thrash (D-state, wchan=mem_cgroup_handle_over_high) that read as a DEAD host for 25 days; a retry-loop command becomes a self-replicating fork storm.

fence() now backgrounds the command and polls its own PPID; on reparent (PPID=1 = sshd gone = the orphaning itself) it kills the whole process group. Group membership survives reparenting, so it reaches already-orphaned grandchildren and the producer wrapper that would respawn them. A HUP trap alone is useless and was verified never to fire. EXIT is deliberately not trapped, so a clean run may still leave an intentional nohup daemon alive. SSH_ARGS gain ServerAlive* so an output-idle long sweep is not reaped by a NAT idle timer.

Verified A/B on aiden: raw ssh + timeout leaves 2 orphans; fenced pool on leaves 0. Regression: stdout/stderr/pipes/exit-code (7) all preserved. Wires the pool-ts-1 follow-on.

title: chore(cloud-guard): remove hexa-dojo training-launcher mandate (keep raw-provider-CLI block)
body: Remove the hexa-dojo training-launcher mandate from cloud-guard. The code guard detectRawDojoDeck — which hard-blocked raw `python train.py`/`torchrun`/`deepspeed`/`accelerate launch` and hand-run dojo|decks run.sh, forcing them through `hexa dojo`/`hexa deck` — is deleted along with the DOJO_LAUNCHERS set. The raw GPU-provider CLI/API block (vast/vastai/runpod/runpodctl + control-plane endpoints, commons c11) is untouched and still fires; only the training/deck-launch forcing is gone. detectRawCloudCli now returns null instead of delegating to detectRawDojoDeck. pre.ts CLOUD-RAW-CLI block message trimmed to point only at `hexa cloud run` (dropped the 'training jobs → hexa dojo / input decks → hexa deck' clauses). Retired the now-dead convergence records NO_RAW_DOJO_DECK and DOJO_TRAIN_NAME_BROAD from ARCHITECTURE.json. QA via local bin/sidecar pre bash: python train.py / torchrun / deepspeed / bash exports/dojo/foo/run.sh all now exit 0 (allow); runpodctl still denies via CLOUD-RAW-CLI. The /dojo and /hdojo scaffolder commands and config dojo{} block are unaffected — only the enforcement was removed.

title: feat(frontier): single north-star objective command — 지정/진행/교체/해제 on a dedicated frontier git ref
body: 신규 sidecar frontier 명령 — 세션/repo 의 단일 north-star 목표(최전선) 추적기. ing(다건 진행보드)과 달리 SINGLE-SLOT. 저장은 ing ref 패턴 미러: 전용 refs/heads/frontier 에 FRONTIER.jsonl(1줄) plumbing(hash-object→mktree→commit-tree→update-ref)+best-effort push origin frontier → branch-switch/reset 무관·공유·protected-main-safe. verb: set(지정·기존 있으면 clobber 거부→swap 유도) · go(진행·push-now 지시 출력+선택 인자를 진행노트 append) · swap(교체·기존 은퇴 id 증가→CHANGELOG+신규 지정, 없으면 set) · clear(해제) · show · inject. 한글 별칭(지정/진행/교체/해제)+designate/advance/replace/release 허용. 셸 특수문자 텍스트는 --stdin. inject 는 SessionStart+per-turn 로 최전선 표면화(미지정=0B 침묵 · git-context/worktree 선례 · advisory only, Stop 강제게이트 없음). 배선 wire-to-prod 양쪽: setup.ts(UserPromptSubmit/SessionStart/PreCompact/PostCompact)+hooks/hooks.json(UserPromptSubmit/SessionStart)+pi/sidecar.ts PER_TURN + pi/CLAUDE.md 매핑 lockstep. 등록 cli/index.ts import+case+HELP · commands/frontier.md 델리게이터 · toolkit write(82→83) · ARCHITECTURE module-frontier 노드. QA 14케이스 ALL PASS(show empty·go-unset warn·set·clobber refuse·go+note·swap id증가·inject set/unset(0B)·한글별칭 지정/진행/해제·usage) · help 파싱 스모크 green.

title: feat(worktree+ing): ING↔stranded task linkage (#7) + worktree stop-check last-Stop nudge (#5)
body: stranded-work 가시성 마무리 2건(Fable 랭킹 #5·#7). (#7 ING↔stranded 링크) ing Item 에 branch? 필드 추가 + ing add/next 가 현재 branch(BOARD_ROOT 기준·≠main/master/HEAD)를 스탬프 → stranded 워크트리/브랜치를 그 태스크로 역링크. 신규 export findIngForBranch(branch,items): Tier1=branch 정확 스탬프 매치(최신), Tier2=무스탬프 구엔트리용 보수적 fallback(전체 branch명 리터럴이 text 에 포함 AND 이름이 distinctive(len≥8||"/") AND 유일매치일 때만), 모호/무매치→null(잘못된 매치가 no-match보다 해로우므로 FP-averse). worktree inject + sidecar end 6/6b 의 각 stranded 라인에 ` — 🔄 ING#<id>: <text>` 인라인(readItems 1콜·stranded 있을 때만·clean=0B). (#5 Stop-time 넛지) 신규 `sidecar worktree stop-check`(warn-only·never block): prompt-scan(다음 프롬프트)·worktree inject(다음 세션)·shipStopCheck(미커밋만)이 모두 못 보는 유일 창=세션 마지막 Stop 에 worktree 에 committed-but-unpushed 남기고 터미널 닫는 경우를 warm-context 에서 상기. stop_hook_active anti-wedge + 0-linked fast-exit(classify per-wt git콜 회피) + git-common-dir keyed dedup(branch@tip: 같은 tip 침묵·새 커밋 재경고·해소된 키 prune) 로 긴 세션서 매 Stop 잔소리 방지. 배선 setup.ts Stop[] + hooks/hooks.json Stop 양쪽(setup-ts-1) + install-hooks --global. Stop 훅은 CC 전용이라 CC만 배선(warn-only → wire-to-prod 위반 아님). help/toolkit/ARCHITECTURE(surface-stop·detail-worktree·module-ing) lockstep. QA: findIngForBranch 5케이스(Tier1/Tier2/short-blocked/no-match/empty) PASS · ing add worktree 내 branch 스탬프 확인 · worktree inject 가 `🔄 ING#N` 링크 표시 · stop-check WARN→dedup 침묵→anti-wedge 침묵→new tip 재경고 전부 출력검증 · ci/help/architecture lint green.

title: feat(load+end): active stranded-work gauges — wt N(M⚠)🔴 in load line (TTL-cached) + end classify() upgrade + stranded-branch check
body: stranded-work 가시성 후속 2건(Fable 랭킹 #4·#6). (#4) load 라인 wt 게이지가 stranded 워크트리를 능동 표시: `wt N(M⚠)` + M>0면 무조건 🔴(개수 3/10 임계 무시) — 매 턴 항상 보이는 표면이라 방치작업이 즉시 눈에 띔. classify()는 워크트리당 ~4 git콜이라 매 UserPromptSubmit sync 핫패스엔 과함 → readOpenPRs 와 동일한 git-common-dir TTL캐시(60s) sync 헬퍼 readStrandedWt(포slain 재사용·stranded=비-main 워크트리 dirty|unpushed 정의 동일), cold 턴만 git콜 지불. (#6) `sidecar end` 세션종료 점검을 classify() 로 업그레이드: 방치(⚠ dirty/unpushed)와 정리대기(○ clean merged)를 구분(기존 raw count는 구분 불가), stranded 워크트리는 warn++ 하고 항목별 resume/폐기 명령 출력 + 신규 6b 항목으로 워크트리없는 stranded 로컬브랜치(strandedBranches 재사용 — 소유자의 'stale 브랜치' 케이스)도 flag. 둘 다 기존 워크트리 감지(classify/strandedWorktrees/strandedBranches) 재사용, 발명 0. help 무변경(내부 게이지·기존 verb). ARCHITECTURE detail-3(wt 게이지 stranded 🔴) lockstep. QA: end 가 라이브 stranded 브랜치(ing) flag·load 가 임시 stranded 워크트리에 `wt 1(1⚠)🔴`·clean시 기존 표시 유지·ci green.

title: feat(worktree+prompt-scan): surface stranded worktrees/branches at session-start & first-action (stderr→emitInject bugfix + worktree inject verb)
body: 세션이 stale 브랜치/워크트리에 방치되는 걸 세션 시작·첫 행동 시점에 잡는다. Fable investigate-mode 조사로 근본원인 확정: 신호는 이미 계산되는데 stderr로 나가 에이전트 context에 안 닿음(배선 결함, detection 결함 아님). (A) prompt-scan.ts 버그픽스: strandedWorktrees() 블록을 stderr→emitInject(stdout additionalContext, Claude Code 프로토콜)로 라우팅 — 매 UserPromptSubmit(첫 행동+지속) 노출, clean이면 0바이트(self-limiting). 헤더 주석은 "additionalContext로 주입"이라 주장했는데 실제 stderr였던 문서-코드 불일치를 정정. keyword/hint는 per-turn bloat 회피 위해 stderr 유지. (B) 신규 `sidecar worktree inject` verb(SessionStart+PreCompact+PostCompact WARN·gc 직후): strandedWorktrees()+신규 strandedBranches()(워크트리없는 stranded 로컬브랜치 — classify() 사각지대, 라이브 `ing` 브랜치가 증거)+refs/reaped tip 카운트를 이전세션 이월 방치작업으로 항목별 resume/보존/폐기 명령과 함께 surface, clean이면 0바이트. config worktree.branchAllow 로 의도적 장수브랜치 예외. WARN(SessionStart는 block 불가·FP-averse·persistence가 teeth). 배선: setup.ts SessionStart/Pre/PostCompact[] + hooks/hooks.json SessionStart 양쪽(setup-ts-1) + install-hooks --global + grep 검증. classify()는 isAgent뿐 아니라 모든 linked worktree 열거라 WORKTREE_GONE_ONLY_PILEUP 의 isAgent-only 사각지대 미반복(단 cross-repo는 여전히 repo-local·별개과제). help/toolkit/ARCHITECTURE(detail-worktree·surface-precompact) lockstep. QA: prompt-scan stranded-wt→stdout inject·worktree inject 라이브 ing 브랜치+임시 stranded wt 둘 다 emit·clean=0바이트·ci/help/architecture lint green.
